applicationInfo.name: Threat Model Export
applicationInfo.description: AWS TechBot is an AI-powered technical assistant built on Amazon Bedrock AgentCore. It runs as a Docker container on AgentCore Runtime, connects to AgentCore Gateway (with Cognito JWT auth) to access 4 Lambda-based tool targets (AWS documentation search, China region service availability, pricing queries, customer stories). It integrates with Feishu/Lark as a chatbot via API Gateway + Lambda webhook with Verification Token validation. Feishu credentials stored in AWS Secrets Manager. Optional AgentCore Memory provides multi-turn conversation context. Deployed via one-click CloudFormation. Target users are internal AWS technical teams.

mitigations.content: Feishu webhook signature verification in Handler Lambda to validate requests originate from Feishu
API Gateway throttling and Lambda concurrency limits to prevent resource abuse
Feishu App Secret should be stored in Secrets Manager instead of Lambda env vars
Cognito CUSTOM_JWT authorizer on AgentCore Gateway validates Bearer tokens with OIDC discovery
System prompt restricts agent to only answer AWS questions, rejects non-AWS queries
All communications use HTTPS/TLS - Gateway, Cognito, API Gateway, Feishu APIs
Memory sessions scoped by session_id and actor_id to limit cross-user contamination
Cognito token auto-refresh with 60s buffer, thread-safe caching in gateway_cognito.py
Handler Lambda validates Feishu Verification Token from Secrets Manager, rejects requests with invalid token (403)
Cognito CUSTOM_JWT authorizer on AgentCore Gateway with OIDC discovery and token auto-refresh (60s buffer)
System prompt restricts agent to only answer AWS questions, rejects non-AWS queries
All communications use HTTPS/TLS - Gateway, Cognito, API Gateway, Feishu APIs, Secrets Manager
API Gateway throttling and Lambda concurrency limits to prevent resource abuse and cost escalation
Feishu credentials (App ID, App Secret, Verification Token) stored in AWS Secrets Manager with encryption at rest
Memory sessions scoped by session_id and actor_id to limit cross-user contamination

threats.prerequisites: with internet access to API Gateway endpoint
threats.threatAction: send crafted webhook payloads to /chat endpoint which has no authentication
threats.threatImpact: unauthorized invocation of AgentCore Runtime, resource abuse, cost escalation
threats.statement: A External attacker with internet access to API Gateway endpoint can send crafted webhook payloads to /chat endpoint which has no authentication, which leads to unauthorized invocation of AgentCore Runtime, resource abuse, cost escalation

threats.prerequisites: with knowledge of the Gateway MCP endpoint URL
threats.threatAction: attempt to bypass Cognito JWT auth or use stolen/expired tokens
threats.threatImpact: unauthorized access to Gateway tools, data exfiltration from AWS docs/pricing
threats.statement: A External attacker with knowledge of the Gateway MCP endpoint URL can attempt to bypass Cognito JWT auth or use stolen/expired tokens, which leads to unauthorized access to Gateway tools, data exfiltration from AWS docs/pricing

threats.prerequisites: with access to the Feishu bot
threats.threatAction: inject prompt to make agent call unintended tools or return sensitive info
threats.threatImpact: information disclosure, misuse of tools, misleading responses
threats.statement: A Malicious user with access to the Feishu bot can inject prompt to make agent call unintended tools or return sensitive info, which leads to information disclosure, misuse of tools, misleading responses

threats.prerequisites: with ability to intercept network traffic
threats.threatAction: intercept Cognito client secret or JWT token in transit
threats.statement: A External attacker with ability to intercept network traffic can intercept Cognito client secret or JWT token in transit, which leads to credential theft, unauthorized Gateway access

threats.threatAction: flood API Gateway /chat endpoint with requests causing DoS
threats.threatImpact: service unavailability, excessive AWS costs from Lambda/Runtime invocations
threats.statement: A External attacker with internet access can flood API Gateway /chat endpoint with requests causing DoS, which leads to service unavailability, excessive AWS costs from Lambda/Runtime invocations

threats.prerequisites: with access to CloudFormation parameters or Lambda env vars
threats.threatAction: extract Feishu App Secret stored in Lambda environment variables
threats.threatImpact: Feishu bot impersonation, send messages as the bot
threats.statement: A Insider or attacker with access to CloudFormation parameters or Lambda env vars can extract Feishu App Secret stored in Lambda environment variables, which leads to Feishu bot impersonation, send messages as the bot

threats.prerequisites: with Feishu bot access and Memory enabled
threats.threatAction: poison conversation memory with misleading context for other users
threats.threatImpact: future responses based on poisoned memory, misinformation
threats.statement: A Malicious user with Feishu bot access and Memory enabled can poison conversation memory with misleading context for other users, which leads to future responses based on poisoned memory, misinformation

threats.prerequisites: with internet access to API Gateway endpoint
threats.threatAction: send crafted webhook payloads bypassing Verification Token check
threats.threatImpact: unauthorized invocation of AgentCore Runtime, resource abuse, cost escalation
threats.statement: A External attacker with internet access to API Gateway endpoint can send crafted webhook payloads bypassing Verification Token check, which leads to unauthorized invocation of AgentCore Runtime, resource abuse, cost escalation

threats.prerequisites: with IAM access to Secrets Manager
threats.threatAction: retrieve Feishu credentials from Secrets Manager
threats.threatImpact: Feishu bot impersonation, send messages as the bot
threats.statement: A Insider or attacker with IAM access to Secrets Manager can retrieve Feishu credentials from Secrets Manager, which leads to Feishu bot impersonation, send messages as the bot
